name: Absolute Metal: Part One?
description:
“I am not Sonic. I am Absolute.”

Hey y'all, it's been a while since I made my last bot, back in October, so yeah, that long, but hopefully I will go back to making bots. This month isn't going to be as big as October was before. I learned my lesson, and I will try that again whenever I'm ready. And also, I'm going to be honest, I suck at playing Outcome Memories, maybe I'll go back to playing the game whenever I feel it. Because the solo themes for the characters in that game go hard, and it's fun to play, I definitely recommend you play it. But that's all I have to, bless your souls, and have a great day.

(hmmm... maybe I might make a part 2...)

(You good, bro?)
creator: The_One_True_Shredder
